requirement_text: RTI shall track ownership of object instance attributes
At most one federate may own a given attribute of a given object instance at a time
A federate shall update only attributes it owns
RTI shall provide unconditional attribute ownership divestiture
RTI shall provide negotiated attribute ownership divestiture
RTI shall notify federates when ownership divestiture is requested
RTI shall provide attribute ownership acquisition
RTI shall provide attribute ownership acquisition if available
RTI shall notify a federate when ownership acquisition succeeds
RTI shall not invoke attributeOwnershipAcquisitionNotification when the owning federate denies release and acquisition does not complete
RTI shall notify a federate when ownership acquisition fails
RTI shall allow a federate to release ownership in response to acquisition requests
RTI shall not invoke requestAttributeOwnershipRelease when acquisition-if-available cannot proceed immediately and ownership remains with the current owner
RTI shall support cancellation of ownership acquisition attempts
RTI shall report cancellation confirmation where required
RTI shall support ownership query for object instance attributes
RTI shall notify whether an attribute is owned unowned or owned by another federate
RTI shall support region-based data distribution management
RTI shall use FOM-defined dimensions for DDM routing
RTI shall determine relevance from subscription regions and update/send regions
RTI shall provide Create Region
RTI shall provide Commit Region Modifications
RTI shall provide Delete Region
RTI shall support registering object instances with associated regions where applicable
RTI shall support associating regions with object instance attributes
RTI shall support unassociating regions from object instance attributes
RTI shall support subscribing to object-class attributes with regions
RTI shall support unsubscribing object-class attributes with regions
RTI shall support subscribing to interaction classes with regions
RTI shall support unsubscribing interaction classes with regions
RTI shall route attribute updates based on region overlap
RTI shall route interactions based on region overlap where dimensions apply
RTI shall provide services for name/handle lookup
RTI shall provide services for advisory switches
RTI shall provide services for ordering transportation and dimension metadata queries
RTI shall return object class handles by object class name
RTI shall return object class names by object class handle
RTI shall return attribute handles by attribute name and class
RTI shall return attribute names by attribute handle and class
RTI shall return interaction class handles by interaction class name
RTI shall return interaction class names by interaction class handle
RTI shall return parameter handles by parameter name and interaction class
RTI shall return parameter names by parameter handle and interaction class
RTI shall return object instance handles by object instance name
RTI shall return object instance names by object instance handle
RTI shall return dimension handles by dimension name
RTI shall return dimension names by dimension handle
RTI shall return available dimensions for object attributes or interactions
RTI shall return transportation type handles and names
RTI shall return order type handles and names
RTI shall support enabling and disabling advisory switches
RTI shall provide callbacks for advisory switch changes where required
